nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Standalone static HTML demo of the RAIS-Pro 'Premium Diagnostic Cockpit' UI with the full editorial design system (Fraunces/Inter Tight/JetBrains Mono, warm paper-and-charcoal palette, light/dark themes) inlined as CSS variables.
nodes.languageNotes: Self-contained single-file mockup — all styles inline, fonts from Google Fonts; mirrors the CSS variable theming used by the real app.

nodes.name: MASTER.md
nodes.summary: Design system master specification covering the global color palette, typography, spacing, shadows, component specs (buttons, cards, inputs, modals), style guidelines, explicit anti-patterns, and a pre-delivery checklist.

nodes.name: dashboard.md
nodes.summary: Page-level design overrides for the dashboard: layout, spacing, typography, color, and component deviations from the MASTER.md design system, plus dashboard-specific components and recommendations.

nodes.name: eslint.config.mjs
nodes.summary: Flat ESLint configuration for the project, wiring in the Next.js/TypeScript lint presets used by the build and CI checks.

nodes.name: jest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Jest configuration built via next/jest: node test environment, '@/' path alias mapping for dynamic requires, exclusion of fixtures and nested .claude/worktrees checkouts, and a setup file forcing the in-memory store.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicit moduleNameMapper is needed because next/jest's SWC transform only rewrites static '@/' imports, not runtime require('@/...') strings.

nodes.name: jest.setup.ts
nodes.summary: Two-line Jest setup file that sets MOID_STORE=memory before any module loads so tests never touch a live Supabase project.

nodes.name: next.config.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal Next.js configuration file exporting the default (near-empty) NextConfig for the app.

nodes.name: postcss.config.mjs
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind CSS plugin pipeline used to process the app's stylesheets.

nodes.name: inspect-excel.js
nodes.summary: Throwaway diagnostic script that opens a local DAILY ACTIVITY REPORT workbook with the xlsx library and prints the first rows of the first few sheets to inspect defect data layout.

nodes.name: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet defining the app's design tokens (paper/ink/accent CSS variables, light and dark themes, density/background/card data-attribute theming), the type scale (.kpi/.h1/.h2/.h3/.body/.small), fonts loaded via @import, and shared CSS animations.
nodes.languageNotes: Theme switching is driven by data attributes on <body> plus CSS variables live-painted by TweaksContext rather than utility classes.

nodes.name: phase5-flow.test.ts
nodes.summary: End-to-end API-layer test proving the Phase 5a MOD-only staging flow — upload, verify with stage overrides, publish, extract records, and ingest into the ledger — against a real corpus workbook, skipped when the fixture file is absent.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses dynamic import() of Next.js route modules and conditional describe.skip when the DATA corpus workbook is missing.
